calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexis Chiu, via Zoom, for and with, Timothy White, Petitioner.

The court discusses the issue of Jeff White and Gary White's children with the Petitioner confirming that the two issues listed in the petition are his brother's only children. The court advises that if the petition is granted, the out-of-state Administrator would have limited authority and a minimum bond of $20,000 would be required.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Sarmiento. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-21-2022 Continued To Apr-27-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
